The '''Algaran system''',<ref name="PoG2" /> also known as the '''Algara system'''<ref name="IJ">''[[I, Jedi]]''</ref> or '''Algar system''',<ref name="">{{CSWECite|I|20|Algara II}}</ref> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> The system was placed directly on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]<ref name="TEA" /> and was centered around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Algar]]. The system's main planet was [[Algara II]], although it also included [[Kerilt]], [[Krizzin]], [[Tonder]], [[Algara V]] and [[Algara VI]].<ref name="PoG2" />
